creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Add LICENSE section
- Add CONFLICTS with japanese/mailman
- Make use of SUB_FILES
- Make use of PORTDOCS
- Apply simple use of OPTIONS
- Add WITHOUT_NLS knob to make portlint happier
- Append "MTA = 'Postfix'" to mm_cfg.py.dist.in when defined WITH_POSTFIX
- Bump PORTREVISION

See also ports/165403

Added file(s):
- files/pkg-deinstall.in
- files/pkg-install.in

Removed file(s):
- pkg-deinstall
- pkg-install
